segments.text: Thus the Lord Yahweh showed me: behold, a basket of summer fruit.
He said,
Amos, what do you see?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I said,
A basket of summer fruit.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Then Yahweh said to me,
The end has come on my people Israel. I will not again pass by them any more.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: The songs of the temple will be wailing in that day,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh.
The dead bodies will be many. In every place they will throw them out with silence.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Hear this, you who desire to swallow up the needy, and cause the poor of the land to fail,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
saying, ‘When will the new moon be gone, that we may sell grain?
And the Sabbath, that we may market wheat, 
making the ephah small, and the shekel large, 
and dealing falsely with balances of deceit;
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
that we may buy the poor for silver, and the needy for a pair of sandals, 
and sell the sweepings with the wheat?’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Yahweh has sworn by the pride of Jacob,
Surely I will never forget any of their works.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Won’t the land tremble for this, and everyone mourn who dwells in it? Yes, it will rise up wholly like the River; and it will be stirred up and sink again, like the River of Egypt.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: It will happen in that day,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh,

that I will cause the sun to go down at noon, 
and I will darken the earth in the clear day.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: I will turn your feasts into mourning, and all your songs into lamentation; and I will make you wear sackcloth on all your bodies, and baldness on every head. I will make it like the mourning for an only son, and its end like a bitter day.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Behold, the days come,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh,

that I will send a famine in the land, 
not a famine of bread, 
nor a thirst for water, 
but of hearing Yahweh’s words.
segments.speaker: the Lord
the Lord

segments.text: In that day the beautiful virgins and the young men will faint for thirst.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
Those who swear by the sin of Samaria, and say, ‘As your god, Dan, lives,’
and, ‘As the way of Beersheba lives,’
they will fall, and never rise up again.
segments.speaker: the Lord
